publishedAbstract: - In OCP GUI: Observe-- Metrics, some PVC stopped reporting any values for metrics like:- `kubelet_volume_stats_capacity_bytes` == total size of the PVC (in bytes)- `kubelet_volume_stats_used_bytes` == used size in the PVC (in bytes)- `kubelet_volume_stats_inodes` == Max number of inodes in the PVC (interger value)- These metrics are required for monitoring the PVC usage.- System failed to collect metrics for some PVCs, but it was collecting metrics for other PVCs
publishedTitle: RHODF kubelet_volume metrics not reported for some PVC
